# Summary

- [ ] Explain the change and why it is needed.

# Testing

- [ ] `bun run test`
- [ ] `bun run lint`
- [ ] `bun run typecheck`
- [ ] Additional notes:

# Documentation

- [ ] Updated the relevant doc(s) (see `docs/`) or checked that no updates are needed.
- [ ] Recorded contract/architecture changes in public docs when applicable.
